000000
010111

014 octal

0 + 8 + 4 = 12 decimal

+ 24 decimal = 36 decimal

000000
100100 decimal

9 decimal
026 octal

0 + 16 + 6 = 22 + 9 = 31

000000
011111


0x0c + 0o037

12 + 0 + 24 + 7 = 43

000000
101011

0b001100 + 0x0e = 12 + 15 = 27

000000
011011


11111010

IEEE 754 - todos errados

4.523 EM DECIMAL

4 = 0100
0.523 = 100001
4.523 = 0100.100001 * 2⁰
4.523 = 01.00100001 * 2²
00100010

3.105 = 011.000110 * 2⁰
3.105 = 01.1000110 * 2¹
3 = 011
0.105 = 000110

4.081 = 0100.0001 * 2⁰
4.081 = 01.000001 * 2²
4 = 0100
0.081 = 0001

3.756 = 011.101 * 2⁰
3.756 = 01.1101 * 2¹	
3 = 011
0.756 = 101

-3.563 = 10010111
3 = 011
0.563 = 1001
3.563 =  011.10001 * 2⁰
3.563 =  01.110001 * 2¹
